creator: darehanl@gmail.com
text:

> Still fails:
>
> http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/tb/ibus-qt-1.3.0.log.bz2

Sorry, I haven't mastered the art of plist making yet. This in
pkg-plist seems to work. Should I post the full contents of my
textproc/ibus-qt?


include/ibus-qt/qibusattribute.h

@dirrm share/doc/ibus-qt
@dirrm include/ibus-qt
